exchange.title: Exchange Links
exchange.description: Want to become a friend of NgetehNology? Add this site first, then send your site details so we can review and publish it here.

site.name: NgetehNology
site.description: Blog tentang Keamanan Siber dan Teknologi.

steps.title: Add this site
steps.description: Place NgetehNology on your friend links page using the site details above.

steps.title: Send your details
steps.description: Share your site name, description, URL, avatar, and preferred tags.

steps.title: Wait for review
steps.description: After checking the link and site quality, your site will be added here.

requirements: No malware, spam, or harmful material
Maintained site with reasonable loading speed
exchange.tip: 💡 Tips: Tautan teman bukan hanya koneksi antar situs, tetapi juga ikatan persahabatan antar blogger. Mari kita bertemu dan bertumbuh bersama di dunia digital ini!
